description: Quasar for women by Jesus Del Pozo is an aromatic fruity fragrance. Top notes are banana leaf and fruity notes middle notes are rosemary, lavender, sage and geranium base notes are sandalwood, patchouli, oakmoss and cedar. Fresh and long lasting, this fragrance comes in a bottle shaped like the gear system of an automobile.Quantity: 125 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
